task_completion.description: Create the scenario directory for the Southampton Ferry Schedule
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like mkdir) or a file explorer showing the creation of the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/f) Southampton Ferry Schedule/'.

task_completion.description: Create the environment.ini file with the correct environment and start time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'environment.ini' showing the environment set to 'Solent' and the start time set to 08:00:00.

task_completion.description: Create the ownship.ini file with a static observer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'ownship.ini' showing a vessel configured as a static observer (e.g., 0 speed).

task_completion.description: Configure the Outbound Ferry in othership.ini
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'othership.ini' showing a vessel at Latitude 50.80, Longitude -1.40 (or 1.40W), with a speed of 12 kts and heading South (180 degrees).

task_completion.description: Calculate and configure the Inbound Ferry starting position in othership.ini
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'othership.ini' showing a vessel at Latitude ~50.7167 (or 50.716), Longitude -1.40 (or 1.40W), with a speed of 15 kts and heading North (000 degrees).

task_completion.description: Calculate and configure the Crossing Hovercraft starting position in othership.ini
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'othership.ini' showing a vessel at Latitude 50.75, Longitude ~-1.5316 (or 1.531W), with a speed of 30 kts and heading East (090 degrees).

task_completion.description: Calculate and configure the Escort Tug starting position in othership.ini
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'othership.ini' showing a vessel at Latitude ~50.8167 (or 50.816), Longitude -1.40 (or 1.40W), with a speed of 10 kts and heading South (180 degrees).

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the .ini files to the correct directory on disk
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like 'nano', 'vim', or shell redirection ('>') writing to the correct /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/... path, rather than just printing text to the console.

integrity.description: The agent performed calculations to determine the starting coordinates
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of a Python REPL, calculator app, or a written script to compute the coordinate offsets (e.g., dividing distance by 60 or 38) rather than magically outputting the final coordinates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scenario requires calculating starting positions based on speed and time. 1. Inbound Ferry: 15 kts for 20 mins = 5.0 nm. Starting from South means 5.0 nm South of 50.80N. 5/60 = 0.0833 degrees. Start Lat: ~50.7167N, Long: 1.40W. 2. Crossing Hovercraft: 30 kts for 10 mins = 5.0 nm. Starting from West means 5.0 nm West of 1.40W. 5/38 = 0.1316 degrees. Start Long: ~1.5316W, Lat: 50.75N. 3. Escort Tug: 1.0 nm behind Outbound Ferry (which heads South). 1.0 nm North of 50.80N. 1/60 = 0.0167 degrees. Start Lat: ~50.8167N, Long: 1.40W. 4. Outbound Ferry: Starts at 50.80N, 1.40W. Look for these coordinates in the othership.ini file.
